'''haruzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wurley|wurley]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wurley|wurley]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| haruzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hærizhith|hærizhith]] || [[word:hærizhij|hærizhij]] || [[word:hærizhish|hærizhish]] || [[word:hærizhi|hærizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:haruruzhuth|haruruzhuth]] || [[word:haruruzhuj|haruruzhuj]] || [[word:haruruzhush|haruruzhush]] || [[word:haruruzhu|haruruzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:haruzhuth|haruzhuth]] || [[word:haruzhuj|haruzhuj]] || [[word:haruzhush|haruzhush]] || [[word:haruzhu|haruzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:harufzhuth|harufzhuth]] || [[word:harufzhuj|harufzhuj]] || [[word:harufzhush|harufzhush]] || [[word:harufzhuf|harufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:haruzhuthu|haruzhuthu]] || [[word:haruzhuju|haruzhuju]] || [[word:haruzhushu|haruzhushu]] || [[word:haruzhuku|haruzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:haruzhuth|haruzhuth]] || [[word:haruzhuj|haruzhuj]] || [[word:haruzhush|haruzhush]] || [[word:haruzhu|haruzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:haruzhuthul|haruzhuthul]] || [[word:haruzhujul|haruzhujul]] || [[word:haruzhushul|haruzhushul]] || [[word:haruzhukul|haruzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haruzhuthuthu|haruzhuthuthu]] || [[word:haruzhujuju|haruzhujuju]] || [[word:haruzhushushu|haruzhushushu]] || [[word:haruzhuku|haruzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:haruzhuthun|haruzhuthun]] || [[word:haruzhujun|haruzhujun]] || [[word:haruzhushun|haruzhushun]] || [[word:haruzhukun|haruzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:haruzhuthuoro|haruzhuthuoro]] || [[word:haruzhujuoro|haruzhujuoro]] || [[word:haruzhushuoro|haruzhushuoro]] || [[word:haruzhukuoro|haruzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
